title: Junior Business Development Manager at ATS Infrastructure

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at ATS Infrastructure
jsonLd.description:
ATS Infrastructure has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ATS Infrastructure:
ATS Infrastructure is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ATS Infrastructure!
